subject: URGENT: Jake has a fever of 101.4 — please call now
preview: Hi, this is Nurse Rivera. Jake came to my office at 10:15 AM with a fever. He needs to be picked up within the hour.

subject: Appointment reminder: TODAY at 2:00 PM
preview: This is a reminder that Emma has a well-child visit scheduled for today at 2:00 PM. Please arrive 10 minutes early.

subject: Practice moved to 4 PM Friday (not 3 PM)
preview: Hey team parents! Due to field maintenance, Friday's practice is now at 4 PM. Same location. Let me know if you have questions.

subject: 30% off TODAY ONLY — your saved items are waiting
preview: You left some great things in your cart! Today only: use code MOM30 for 30% off your entire order. Expires at midnight.

subject: Dinner tonight — are we cooking or ordering?
preview: Hey babe, should I pick something up on my way home or are you making that pasta? Just let me know by 5 so I can plan.

subject: Spring Newsletter — pool opening, lawn care tips & more
preview: The pool opens May 15! Inside: lawn care schedule, the spring potluck on June 7, and new parking rules for the north lot.

subject: Your order has shipped — arriving Thursday
preview: Great news! Your order (#114-9823041) is on its way. Estimated delivery: Thursday by 8 PM. Track your package anytime.

subject: PTA meeting this Thursday at 6:30 PM — agenda inside
preview: Join us Thursday evening in the school library. We'll be discussing the spring carnival, budget updates, and volunteer sign-ups.

subject: Book Fair fundraiser — 42% of goal reached, thank you!
preview: Thanks to your generous support, we've raised $1,260 of our $3,000 goal! The fair runs through Friday. Every purchase helps.

subject: Emma is on a 7-day streak — keep it going!
preview: Way to go! Emma has practiced math 7 days in a row. Explore new courses in science and coding to keep the momentum.
